title: thelypteris keysseriana
intro: Thelypteris keysseriana, also known as Keysser's fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris keysseriana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris keysseriana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
